team_name: AdhikarAI: Explainable & Action-Oriented System for Converting Court Judgments into Verified Government Workflows
summary: Build an AI system to read court judgment PDFs, extract key information, generate a structured action plan, and ensure human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use.
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
